title.en: The White Deer Emperor Ancestor said angrily.

content.en:
"Damn, the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor actually killed our incarnation!!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor said angrily.

The other three Emperor Ancestors were also very annoyed, although the incarnation was killed, it had little effect on them, after all, the incarnation had no power.

But this is a provocation to them, and whoever is killed in the incarnation will be unhappy!

If it weren't for the strength of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor being stronger than them, and they needed the help of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, otherwise they would definitely be at odds with the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

"Wait, when the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor arrives, we must kill this group of cultivators, a group of food dares to resist us!"

The White Deer Emperor Ancestor said coldly.

As time passed, the Devouring Clan's Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors died one by one under Ye Tian's Heaven Slaying Spear.

For such a long time, he had already killed seven Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and directly reduced the Devouring Clan's Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors to nineteen, but it was still a few more than the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

But with Ye Tian alone, the pressure on the ancestors of the half-step domain of the Ten Thousand Things Realm plummeted.

Once Ye Tian killed a few more Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, the Devouring Clan would collapse, and when the Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm were empty-handed, they could quickly kill the other ordinary half-step Domain Ancestors of the Devouring Clan.

At that time, the victory will belong to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

----------------

After the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor left the Devouring Realm, he rushed to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm as fast as he could.

However, the Dao Mountain Realm was a realm after all, and the area was too large, no matter how fast the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was, it would take time to reach the battlefield.

Finally—

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor arrived, only to find that the Devouring Clan was in a vulnerable position at this moment.

"A group of wastes, they know how to devour, and they can't even comprehend the forbidden path, no wonder they can't beat the cultivators at the same level!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor said sarcastically.

Wow!

He tore through the void and descended on the battlefield, and with a single blow, he blew up a thousand-person supreme Dao Ancestor battle array, and those thousands of supreme Dao ancestors fell and died in an instant, which was undoubtedly a huge loss for the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

"It's not good, the One Realm Devourer is here!"

The expressions of the half-step domain ancestors changed drastically.

Even the Dragon Shadow Palace Master's expression changed drastically, they originally thought that the Devouring Clan would have four Returning to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, but they didn't expect another Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor to come.

"I'm going to stop him!"

Ye Tian abandoned those Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors, rushed towards the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, and fought with the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

However.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian flew hundreds of millions of miles upside down, his body was constantly cracked, and his injuries were not light.

"The top Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor !!!"

Ye Tian's expression changed drastically.

Moreover, the other party had just unexpectedly cast a forbidden Dao technique, there was no doubt that this was a half-step domain ancestor of the Returning One Realm who had achieved great cultivation, and his strength was far above that of other Returning Realm half-step domain ancestors.

After he exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, his strength could barely compete with the ordinary Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he was naturally far from being the opponent of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor.

After the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor struck Ye Tian away, he didn't chase and kill Ye Tian, because killing Ye Tian was a bit laborious.

He directly found an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, and that ordinary half-step domain ancestor was none other than a palace master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Rumble!!!

Under the blow of the Frost Heavenly Emperor Ancestor, he directly killed the palace master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Hahaha, comfortable!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor laughed.

He likes the feeling of abusing and killing the weak, killing one with one blow, it's too comfortable.

Soon, one of the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain was killed.

At this moment, the Eternal Dao Ancestor was targeted.

At this moment, the Eternal Dao Ancestor felt cold all over, and his soul seemed to be frozen.

He was just an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, perhaps he could be called a high-ranking among ordinary half-step domain ancestors, but even the Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestor was far from being the opponent of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, let alone him?

He trespassed on the way of time, but time seemed to be frozen at this moment, and it didn't work at all.

"I, am I going to die?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

However, just when the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was about to pinch the Eternal Dao Ancestor to death, Ye Tian made a move.

"Broken!"

The Shadow Thorn struck a blow, ignoring the distance, and directly attacked the center of the Frost Heaven Emperor's eyebrows.

There was a click!!!

A slight crack appeared in the center of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor's eyebrows, and a trace of blood seeped out.

But for the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, this was not an injury.

"Little bug, you are looking for death!"

The Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor was furious and killed Ye Tian, but the Eternal Dao Ancestor survived because of this.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, thank you!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said with gratitude.

Bang bang bang!!!

Ye Tian was not the opponent of the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor at all, and he was completely beaten, but relying on the power of the Extreme Dao and the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, he could still hold on for a while without being killed quickly.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain wanted to come to the rescue of Ye Tian, but the White Deer Emperor desperately stopped him, so he had no chance to save Ye Tian.

As time passed, Ye Tian's situation was very dangerous.

"It's a pity that my copy body was disbanded before, and it is too late to use it again, otherwise the two bodies can fight with this Emperor Ancestor for a longer time!" Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

At this moment, the voice of the Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain spread throughout the entire battlefield and the surrounding territory.

"Your Excellency hasn't come out to help, if the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is defeated, you won't be good!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

Hearing this, the Devourer was shocked.

Could it be that there are still strong people in the ancient realm?

And the half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm were overjoyed in their hearts, if there was still help, their pressure would be reduced a lot.

"Hehe, the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain is really extraordinary, I am hiding so deeply, I was still discovered by you!"

A dark shadow appeared, shrouded in fog and unable to see clearly.

But soon, the fog lifted, and a man appeared, also wearing a mask.

Judging from the breath, this person is also a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, get out of the way, I'll deal with him!"

The Mysterious Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor appeared here and stopped the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, while Ye Tian withdrew from the battle circle between the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor and the Mysterious Dao Ancestor.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian used the copying talent shroud to deal with it, and checked the opponent's talent.

Judging from his talent, Ye Tian knew his identity.

"Chen Lingtian!"

This is the other party's name, and judging from the other party's introduction, the other party is called Ling Tian Dao Ancestor!

He didn't know about the situation in the Divine Heaven Realm, so he didn't know Ling Tian Dao Ancestor, maybe the other half-step Domain Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain had heard of it.

With Ling Tian Dao Ancestor blocking the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor, Ye Tian would have a chance to deal with the other Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.
